title: Chill Out with Pillow Power!
story: Every May 29, people around the world celebrate Put a Pillow on Your Fridge Day by doing exactly what it sounds like - placing a soft pillow right on top of their refrigerator! This quirky holiday started as a fun way to bring good luck and prosperity to your home. Some families use their fluffiest pillow, while others pick a special decorative one just for the occasion. People love sharing photos of their pillow-topped fridges on social media, creating a hilarious collection of creative displays. Whether you believe in the luck or just enjoy the silliness, this unusual tradition brings smiles and laughter to kitchens everywhere on this special day.
activity_question: What do people put on top of their refrigerator on this holiday?
bonus_fact: Some people use tiny dollhouse pillows if their fridge is too small!
